description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house surrounded by a driveway, a front yard, and several trees. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a central entryway accessible via a straight driveway. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or siding, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade. The property includes a backyard area with a patio or garden space, and the landscaping is enhanced by evenly spaced trees and a single flowering tree. There is a garage attached to one side of the house, and the overall layout suggests a suburban residential setting. The house appears to be two stories tall, with a clear separation between the ground and upper floors.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard with multiple trees. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and a central driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, backyard patio area, and the depth of the house structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio or garden space, and the back facade with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a straight driveway, single front door, and small steps leading to the entrance, flanked by landscaping and trees.
